abandoned_reason: Superseded by vskill-platform increment 0002-neon-to-hetzner-postgres-migration, which executed the migration on 2026-05-17 (Neon project blue-fog-19673548 deleted, traffic on Hetzner postgres-easychamp PG17 cluster port 5433). This umbrella spec was spec-only and never executed.
trigger: Neon monthly cost exceeds Hetzner equivalent + ops capacity available
summary: Migrate verified-skill.com Postgres from Neon serverless to self-hosted PostgreSQL on existing Hetzner VM infrastructure. Cost-optimization play — Neon's per-compute-hour pricing scales unfavorably as the catalog grows past ~120K skills; a managed Hetzner VM with pgBackRest can serve the same workload at a fraction of the cost. Out-of-scope for this session; spec only.
